summary: Comprehensive testing of Passport Dynamique de Compétences feature completed. Backend: 24/24 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All passport UI elements verified working - 6 tabs (Profil, Compétences, Émergentes, Expériences, Parcours, Passerelles), completeness gauge with source breakdown, profile CRUD, competence CRUD with categories/levels, experience CRUD with types, AI passerelles analysis via GPT-5.2. OpenAI integration working for /api/passport/passerelles endpoint.

backend_api: GET /api/passport - creates passport on first call with aggregated data from coffre-fort, modules, ubuntoo
GET /api/passport - returns existing passport on subsequent calls
POST /api/passport/refresh - refreshes from all sources and preserves declared competences
PUT /api/passport/profile - updates professional_summary field
PUT /api/passport/profile - updates career_project field
PUT /api/passport/profile - updates motivations list
PUT /api/passport/profile - updates compatible_environments list
PUT /api/passport/profile - updates target_sectors list
PUT /api/passport/profile - increases completeness score
POST /api/passport/competences - adds new competence with name, category, level
POST /api/passport/competences - multiple additions increase completeness score
POST /api/passport/competences - works with all categories (technique, transversale, relationnelle)
POST /api/passport/competences - works with all levels (debutant, intermediaire, avance, expert)
POST /api/passport/experiences - adds new experience with title, organization, skills_used
POST /api/passport/experiences - works with all types (professionnel, personnel, benevole, projet)
POST /api/passport/experiences - multiple additions increase completeness score
DELETE /api/passport/competences/{id} - deletes declared competence
DELETE /api/passport/experiences/{id} - deletes declared experience
GET /api/passport/passerelles - triggers AI analysis via GPT-5.2 (OpenAI working)
GET /api/passport/passerelles - saves passerelles to passport
PUT /api/passport/sharing - updates is_public, shared_sections, shared_with settings
PUT /api/passport/sharing - sets passport to private
Invalid token returns 401 for all endpoints
frontend_ui: Passport view loads at /dashboard/passeport with data-testid='passport-view'
Navigation bar shows 'Passeport' link for particulier role
Header shows 'Mon Passeport de Compétences' title
Completeness gauge shows percentage (0-100%) with progress bar
Source breakdown shows counts by source (Ubuntoo, Déclaré, etc.)
Stats cards show: Compétences count, Expériences count, emergentes count, formations count
6 tabs working: Profil, Compétences, Émergentes, Expériences, Parcours, Passerelles
Profil tab shows 5 fields: Synthèse professionnelle, Projet professionnel, Motivations, Environnements compatibles, Secteurs cibles
Profile edit: Modifier button opens edit form, Enregistrer saves, Annuler cancels
Profile save shows 'Profil mis à jour' toast and increases completeness score
Compétences tab: Ajouter button opens dialog with name, category, level fields
Add competence dialog has: name input, category dropdown (Technique/Transversale/Relationnelle), level dropdown (Débutant/Intermédiaire/Avancé/Expert)
Competence cards show: name, category badge, source badge, level progress bar, delete button (for declared)
Add competence shows 'Compétence ajoutée' toast
Expériences tab: Ajouter button opens dialog with title, organization, description, skills_used, achievements, experience_type
Experience cards show: title, organization, type badge, skills used badges, delete button (for declared)
Add experience shows 'Expérience ajoutée' toast
Passerelles tab: 'Analyser mon profil' button triggers AI analysis
AI analysis returns 5 career pathways with compatibility scores
Passerelle cards show: job_name, sector, compatibility %, accessibility badge, shared_skills, skills_to_acquire, training_needed
Passerelles analysis shows 'N passerelles identifiées par l'IA' toast
Actualiser button refreshes passport from all sources

seed_data_creation: POST /api/seed includes ubuntoo signals that aggregate into passport competences
test_credentials: No credentials needed - anonymous authentication. Use POST /api/auth/anonymous with {role: 'particulier'} to get token
context_for_next_testing_agent: Passport Dynamique de Compétences feature fully tested and working. All backend APIs return correct data structures. Frontend passport page displays all 6 tabs with correct functionality: profile edit/save, competence CRUD with categories/levels, experience CRUD with types, learning path display, AI-powered passerelles analysis via GPT-5.2. Completeness score correctly updates based on filled sections. Source breakdown shows aggregation from coffre-fort, modules, ubuntoo, contributions, and user declarations.

features_verified.passport_get_api: ✓ GET /api/passport creates on first call, returns existing on subsequent calls
features_verified.passport_refresh_api: ✓ POST /api/passport/refresh re-aggregates from all sources, preserves declared items
features_verified.passport_competences_api: ✓ POST/DELETE /api/passport/competences CRUD with categories and levels
features_verified.passport_navigation_ui: ✓ Navigation bar shows 'Passeport' link for particulier role
features_verified.passport_tabs_ui: ✓ 6 tabs: Profil, Compétences, Émergentes, Expériences, Parcours, Passerelles
features_verified.passport_completeness_ui: ✓ Completeness gauge shows percentage and source breakdown
features_verified.passport_profile_ui: ✓ Profile edit with Modifier/Enregistrer buttons and 5 fields
features_verified.passport_competences_ui: ✓ Add competence dialog with name, category, level; cards with delete buttons
features_verified.passport_experiences_ui: ✓ Add experience dialog with title, org, skills; cards with delete buttons
features_verified.passport_passerelles_ui: ✓ Analyser mon profil button triggers AI, shows 5 passerelle cards with compatibility scores
